title: Bubble Guns for Kids, Light Up Unicorn Bubble Machine Gun with Wings, Children's Automatic Bubble Maker Bubble Blaster for Outdoor Garden Party,Bubble Blower for Girls Gift(Purple)
features: 【Light Up Unicorn Design】Jovicos unicorn bubble gun with vibrant wing design, emit colourful soft light during use, whimsical design inspire children's imaginations and stands out at parties or outdoor play.

【360° Leak Proof Design】The bubble solution bottle with 360° anti-leakage design, ensures that no matter how you rotate it, the liquid will not leak out, means don't have to worry about your child spreading bubble liquid on their body or hands while playing.

【One-Button Easy Operation】Designed for easy use with a simple one-button operation, just insert 4 AA batteries (not included), connect the bubble solution bottle, finally attach the wings and press the switch.

【Safe for Kids】Made of BPA-free ABS, soap solution non-toxic and odorless, safe to kid’ s skin and face. Smooth edge and a good size for small hands to grip, tested international toy safety standards for worry-free play.

【Ideal Gifts for Girls】Lovely unicorn with wings, LED light and thousands of colorful bubbles, bring endless fun and dreamy atmosphere in a series of activities, loved by gilrs, will be a perfect gift for kids on Birthday, Children's Day, New Year or other special days.
description: Product Description Q1: Why are no bubbles forming or dripping? 1.Blocked bubble outlet or air intake – Gently clean the air holes with a cotton swab or toothpick. 2.Bubble bottle cap is too tight – Loosen the cap slightly to allow proper airflow. Q2: Why are the lights on but no bubbles coming out? The batteries may be low. Even when batteries are weak, they can sometimes still power the lights. Please replace them with new ones. Q3: It still isn’t working after replacing the batteries. What should I do? Please ensure the batteries are installed correctly according to the +/- polarity signs.

specifications_table.Manufacturer Warranty Description: Manufacturer warranty for 90 days from date of purchase.
